title: • Factions can reject an exile’s request.
content:
• Factions can reject an exile’s request.
• Some exiled leaders may choose to remain independent for buffs.

📜 Why This Works:
✔ Adds consequence to leadership struggles.
✔ Prevents constant faction hopping.
✔ Creates strategic depth for leaders looking for redemption.

📜 3. The Fate Wheel – Randomized Weekly Events with Risk & Reward

📜 A spinning Fate Wheel will determine additional randomized chaos each week.

✔ How It Works:
• At the start of class, the Fate Wheel spins to select a random effect.
• Fate effects range from minor inconveniences to major upheavals.
• Some archetypes can manipulate fate through abilities or buffs.

✔ Examples of Fate Wheel Events:
